scripts.dev: mkdir -p logs && vite dev 2>&1 | tee logs/server.log
scripts.refs:tan-form: rm -rf refs/tan-form && mkdir -p refs/tan-form && curl -L https://github.com/TanStack/form/archive/refs/tags/@tanstack/react-form@1.28.5.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/tan-form --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:tan-router: rm -rf refs/tan-router && mkdir -p refs/tan-router && curl -L https://github.com/TanStack/router/archive/refs/tags/release-2026-03-22-0931.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/tan-router --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:tan-query: rm -rf refs/tan-query && mkdir -p refs/tan-query && curl -sL https://github.com/TanStack/query/archive/refs/tags/@tanstack/react-query@5.95.0.tar.gz | tar -xzC refs/tan-query --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:tan-start: rm -rf refs/tan-start && mkdir -p refs/tan-start && curl -L https://github.com/TanStack/router/archive/refs/tags/release-2026-03-22-0931.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/tan-start --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:effect4: rm -rf refs/effect4 && mkdir -p refs/effect4 && curl -L https://github.com/Effect-TS/effect-smol/archive/refs/tags/effect@4.0.0-beta.38.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/effect4 --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:shadcn: rm -rf refs/shadcn && mkdir -p refs/shadcn && curl -L https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/archive/refs/tags/shadcn@3.8.5.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/shadcn --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:tan-table: rm -rf refs/tan-table && mkdir -p refs/tan-table && curl -L https://github.com/TanStack/table/archive/refs/tags/v8.21.3.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/tan-table --strip-components=1
